case_title: CHONG LAM KAM VS. RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM NATIONAL GENERAL INSURANCE (RE: INTEGON NATIONAL INS. CO.) AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KAM, CHONG LAM AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ ALVAREZ, SILVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-30-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-22-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PROOF OF UNSUCESSFUL SERVICE FILED. 12/1/2021, NO ONE HOME, 12/10/2021, NO ONE HOME SERVED DEC-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ
ORDER TO CONNTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CHONG LAM KAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA AND SYLVIA ALVAREZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SYLVIA ALVAREZ WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER PATRICE BINAISA. BILL DIRK, FIELD CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE FOR NATIONAL GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY, DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. DEFENDANT SYLVIA ALVAREZ IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY THE COURT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON 2ND DEFENDANT, AND TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-04-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHONG LAM KAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SYLVIA ALVEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOFS OF SERVICES ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA ON 1/18/22; MALING DONE 1/21/22 (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHONG LAM AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAM, CHONG LAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ $2,280.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,370.00, DEFENDANT SILVIA ALVAREZ IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-15-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHONG LAM KAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SYLVIA ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON SYLVIA ALVEREZ. DEFENDANT RODRIGO LOPEZ BAUTISTA REQUESTS A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, RODRIGO LOPEZ
